overview: A multi-user customer management app where each user logs in with their mobile number and a one-time password. Everyone sees only their own customers. The admin user (8128111699) can view all users and their complete customer lists from a dedicated admin panel. Built with full CRUD, search, filters, export, and color theme customization.
features: OTP login with mobile number (code displayed in-app)
Admin panel showing all users and their customer lists
Customer entry form with 10-digit mobile validation
Customer list with search, filters, export/import
Settings with color theme and field management
